review_text: {"verdict":"APPROVE","summary":"The Codex-authored change adds a bounded Claude Maker proposal lane for the fixed U1-P2 doc pilot. It is dispatch-only, paused by default, SHA/path/Issue-bound, tool-less, schema-validated, and can only post to private Issue #10 with no source-write or PR credential. Reservation, budget, lease, pause, and provenance are revalidated before publish; render/publish require byte-for-byte deterministic re-render binding the digest to posted content. Quality gate enforces read-only tokens, dispatch-only triggers, and immutable action SHAs. No open P0/P1/P2 found in the supplied diff.","findings":[{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"validate_review_binding only enforces identical activation/limits when Maker status is approved_active; a proposed_paused Maker paired with an active review packet is not cross-checked, but this cannot trigger a model call since require_active blocks paused dispatch. Low residual risk."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"verify_run_budget and reservation checks rely on GitHub API list completeness (total_count == len). If the source API paginated or misreported counts the ledger fails closed via explicit checks, so impact is availability, not bypass. No evidence of unbounded pages beyond the 3-page cap in list_issue_comments."},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"Per-model duplicate relaxation: reserve_attempt independently rejects models outside ALLOWED_MODELS and treats a legacy call without requested_model as matching any model, remaining fail-closed. Tests cover legacy, unapproved, and one-per-model cases."},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"append_github_env collision test proves a content-derived delimiter forced-collision fails closed and leaves no file, mitigating GITHUB_ENV injection of the prompt value."},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"proposed_content forbids <!--, -->, ~~~, control chars, credential patterns, and mentions; render uses a tilde fence, so backtick/HTML fence escape and forged executor markers are blocked before publication."}],"verification":["Workflow is workflow_dispatch-only with a single opaque numeric ticket_id; no pilot_id/head_sha/request_id inputs; quality-gate greps forbid pull_request_target/issue_comment/schedule and contents/issues/pull-requests/deployments:write.","config/u1-maker.json ships status proposed_paused with all activation flags false and source_write_allowed false; validate_config pins pilot, limits, forbidden_effects, control Issue, model, and action SHAs.","Model step runs claude-opus-4-8 with --tools \"\", disallowed Read/Bash/Edit/Write/Web/Task/Glob/Grep/mcp, --strict-mcp-config, --setting-sources \"\", and a bounded json-schema matching the versioned schema (drift test).","Publish revalidates reservation, lease expiry, budgets, control pause presence, kill-switch absence, no open PR, no duplicate marker, and requires byte-for-byte re-render equality via hmac.compare_digest before POSTing only an Issue comment.","Reservation binds head_sha == trusted_source_policy_sha, exclusive live lease tied to ticket, and per-family/per-pilot usage caps (6 total, 2 per pilot).","Tests exercise paused defaults, window>7d rejection, path/issue drift, reviewer-role and source-write rejection, budget exhaustion, one-use ticket, digest rendering, and current-content rebinding."],"requirement_coverage":["Unsafe automation bounded: no branch, PR, merge, source-write, or deploy; publication limited to private Issue #10.","Credential exposure guarded: reuses read/Issues-only Season 2 token, persist-credentials:false checkout, github.token kept read-only, and logs suppressed (display_report/show_full_output false).","Budget bypass covered by private usage ledger and public workflow-run ledger with total/per-pilot caps and single-use ticket enforcement.","Fail-closed behavior: broad except returns INVALID; missing/duplicate/stale/malformed state denies; paused packet blocks all calls.","Tests-prove-claim: drift test binds inline vs versioned schema; forced-collision and rebinding tests prove env-writer and digest-content binding."],"residual_risk":["Reviewer trusts the Codex adjudication note's claim of 87 passing tests and unchanged append_github_env internals not fully shown in this diff; behavior asserted only via the included collision test.","Paused/active review-binding asymmetry (P3) is inert while paused but should be tightened before activation.","Live GitHub API ordering/pagination beyond enforced caps could cause availability denials, not authorization bypass."]}
reason: Unstructured Claude output is useful feedback but can never authorize approval.
